title: Iran war live: Trump says US to blockade Hormuz, IRGC insists strait open
snippet: IRGC Navy: 'any wrong move will trap the enemy in the strait's deadly currents.' Strait open for civilian vessels, military ships 'will be dealt with severely.' IRGC warns US: full control over Hormuz. Head of Iran's negotiating team: 'Trump's threats are nothing, we are ready to give the United States a new lesson.'
tag_reason: New IRGC response to Trump blockade: specific military warnings and surveillance footage release. Distinguishes civilian vs military vessel policy.
